/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g -Wl,--export-dynamic -rdynamic  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/my_alloc-t.dir/my_alloc-t.cc.o -o ../../runtime_output_directory/my_alloc-t  libsqlgunitlib.a libgunit_small.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a ../../libgmock.a ../../libgtest.a
